scripts.reset:dev: npm run clean:metro && npm run clean:device && npm run reverse:android
scripts.start: pkill -f "expo start" || true; bash scripts/android-reverse.sh || true; expo start --go --lan --port 8083
scripts.start:clean: pkill -f "expo start" || true; bash scripts/android-reverse.sh || true; expo start --go --lan --clear --port 8083
scripts.start:localhost: pkill -f "expo start" || true; bash scripts/android-reverse.sh || true; EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL="http://127.0.0.1:5051" EXPO_PUBLIC_SCAN_API_URL="http://127.0.0.1:8000" expo start --go --localhost --port 8083
scripts.android: pkill -f "expo start" || true; bash scripts/android-reverse.sh || true; expo start --go --lan --port 8083
scripts.debug:open: adb shell am start -a android.intent.action.VIEW -d "exp://127.0.0.1:8083" host.exp.exponent
scripts.debug:status: adb devices && adb reverse --list && curl -sS "http://127.0.0.1:5051/api/health" && echo && (curl -sS -o /dev/null -w "scan http=%{http_code}\n" "http://127.0.0.1:8000/docs" || echo "scan not reachable on host :8000 (start ScanAndSave / uvicorn)")
scripts.debug:clear-expo: adb shell am force-stop host.exp.exponent && adb shell pm clear host.exp.exponent
